valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Sat 09 May 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Sun 10 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low Norwegian Sea 1003 slow-moving with little change by midnight tonight. Low just west of Trafalgar 999 expected Trafalgar 1002 by same time
